message:
fix: handle PolledAfterCompletion LockError variant in embed, lexical, and rerank

Add match arms for the new LockError::PolledAfterCompletion variant across
all subsystems that use asupersync lock futures, mapping it to appropriate
SearchError types with descriptive messages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
